潇湘
Home
Guide
Home
Guide

# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on Keep a Changelog (opens new window), and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning (opens new window).

# 3.14.1 (opens new window) - 2020-12-07

# Security

  • Fix possible code execution in (already unsafe) .load() (in &anchor).

# 3.14.0 (opens new window) - 2020-05-22

# Changed

  • Support safe/loadAll(input, options) variant of call.
  • CI: drop outdated nodejs versions.
  • Dev deps bump.

# Fixed

  • Quote = in plain scalars #519.
  • Check the node type for !<?> tag in case user manually specifies it.
  • Verify that there are no null-bytes in input.
  • Fix wrong quote position when writing condensed flow, #526.

# 3.13.1 (opens new window) - 2019-04-05

# Security

  • Fix possible code execution in (already unsafe) .load(), #480.

# 3.13.0 (opens new window) - 2019-03-20

# Security

  • Security fix: safeLoad() can hang when arrays with nested refs used as key. Now throws exception for nested arrays. #475.

# 3.12.2 (opens new window) - 2019-02-26

# Fixed

  • Fix noArrayIndent option for root level, #468.

# 3.12.1 (opens new window) - 2019-01-05

# Added

  • Added noArrayIndent option, #432.

# 3.12.0 (opens new window) - 2018-06-02

# Changed

  • Support arrow functions without a block statement, #421.

# 3.11.0 (opens new window) - 2018-03-05

# Added

  • Add arrow functions suport for !!js/function.

# Fixed

  • Fix dump in bin/octal/hex formats for negative integers, #399.

# 3.10.0 (opens new window) - 2017-09-10

# Fixed

  • Fix condenseFlow output (quote keys for sure, instead of spaces), #371, #370.
  • Dump astrals as codepoints instead of surrogate pair, #368.

# 3.9.1 (opens new window) - 2017-07-08

# Fixed

  • Ensure stack is present for custom errors in node 7.+, #351.

# 3.9.0 (opens new window) - 2017-07-08

# Added

  • Add condenseFlow option (to create pretty URL query params), #346.

# Fixed

  • Support array return from safeLoadAll/loadAll, #350.

# 3.8.4 (opens new window) - 2017-05-08

# Fixed

  • Dumper: prevent space after dash for arrays that wrap, #343.

# 3.8.3 (opens new window) - 2017-04-05

# Fixed

  • Should not allow numbers to begin and end with underscore, #335.

# 3.8.2 (opens new window) - 2017-03-02

# Fixed

  • Fix !!float 123 (integers) parse, #333.
  • Don't allow leading zeros in floats (except 0, 0.xxx).
  • Allow positive exponent without sign in floats.

# 3.8.1 (opens new window) - 2017-02-07

# Changed

  • Maintenance: update browserified build.

# 3.8.0 (opens new window) - 2017-02-07

# Fixed

  • Fix reported position for duplicated mapping key errors. Now points to block start instead of block end. (#243, thanks to @shockey).

# 3.7.0 (opens new window) - 2016-11-12

# Added

  • Support polymorphism for tags (#300, thanks to @monken).

# Fixed

  • Fix parsing of quotes followed by newlines (#304, thanks to @dplepage).

# 3.6.1 (opens new window) - 2016-05-11

# Fixed

  • Fix output cut on a pipe, #286.

# 3.6.0 (opens new window) - 2016-04-16

# Fixed

  • Dumper rewrite, fix multiple bugs with trailing \n. Big thanks to @aepsilon!
  • Loader: fix leading/trailing newlines in block scalars, @aepsilon.

# 3.5.5 (opens new window) - 2016-03-17

# Fixed

  • Date parse fix: don't allow dates with on digit in month and day, #268.

# 3.5.4 (opens new window) - 2016-03-09

# Added

  • noCompatMode for dumper, to disable quoting YAML 1.1 values.

# 3.5.3 (opens new window) - 2016-02-11

# Changed

  • Maintenance release.

# 3.5.2 (opens new window) - 2016-01-11

# Changed

  • Maintenance: missed comma in bower config.

# 3.5.1 (opens new window) - 2016-01-11

# Changed

  • Removed inherit dependency, #239.
  • Better browserify workaround for esprima load.
  • Demo rewrite.

# 3.5.0 (opens new window) - 2016-01-10

# Fixed

  • Dumper. Fold strings only, #217.
  • Dumper. norefs option, to clone linked objects, #229.
  • Loader. Throw a warning for duplicate keys, #166.
  • Improved browserify support (mark esprima & Buffer excluded).

# 3.4.6 (opens new window) - 2015-11-26

# Changed

  • Use standalone inherit to keep browserified files clear.

# 3.4.5 (opens new window) - 2015-11-23

# Added

  • Added lineWidth option to dumper.

# 3.4.4 (opens new window) - 2015-11-21

# Fixed

  • Fixed floats dump (missed dot for scientific format), #220.
  • Allow non-printable characters inside quoted scalars, #192.

# 3.4.3 (opens new window) - 2015-10-10

# Changed

  • Maintenance release - deps bump (esprima, argparse).

# 3.4.2 (opens new window) - 2015-09-09

# Fixed

  • Fixed serialization of duplicated entries in sequences, #205. Thanks to @vogelsgesang.

# 3.4.1 (opens new window) - 2015-09-05

# Fixed

  • Fixed stacktrace handling in generated errors, for browsers (FF/IE).

# 3.4.0 (opens new window) - 2015-08-23

# Changed

  • Don't throw on warnings anymore. Use onWarning option to catch.
  • Throw error on unknown tags (was warning before).
  • Reworked internals of error class.

# Fixed

  • Fixed multiline keys dump, #197. Thanks to @tcr.
  • Fixed heading line breaks in some scalars (regression).

# 3.3.1 (opens new window) - 2015-05-13

# Added

  • Added .sortKeys dumper option, thanks to @rjmunro.

# Fixed

  • Fixed astral characters support, #191.

# 3.3.0 (opens new window) - 2015-04-26

# Changed

  • Significantly improved long strings formatting in dumper, thanks to @isaacs.
  • Strip BOM if exists.

# 3.2.7 (opens new window) - 2015-02-19

# Changed

  • Maintenance release.
  • Updated dependencies.
  • HISTORY.md -> CHANGELOG.md

# 3.2.6 (opens new window) - 2015-02-07

# Fixed

  • Fixed encoding of UTF-16 surrogate pairs. (e.g. "\U0001F431" CAT FACE).
  • Fixed demo dates dump (#113, thanks to @Hypercubed).

# 3.2.5 (opens new window) - 2014-12-28

# Fixed

  • Fixed resolving of all built-in types on empty nodes.
  • Fixed invalid warning on empty lines within quoted scalars and flow collections.
  • Fixed bug: Tag on an empty node didn't resolve in some cases.

# 3.2.4 (opens new window) - 2014-12-19

# Fixed

  • Fixed resolving of !!null tag on an empty node.

# 3.2.3 (opens new window) - 2014-11-08

# Fixed

  • Implemented dumping of objects with circular and cross references.
  • Partially fixed aliasing of constructed objects. (see issue #141 for details)

# 3.2.2 (opens new window) - 2014-09-07

# Fixed

  • Fixed infinite loop on unindented block scalars.
  • Rewritten base64 encode/decode in binary type, to keep code licence clear.

# 3.2.1 (opens new window) - 2014-08-24

# Fixed

  • Nothig new. Just fix npm publish error.

# 3.2.0 (opens new window) - 2014-08-24

# Added

  • Added input piping support to CLI.

# Fixed

  • Fixed typo, that could cause hand on initial indent (#139).

# 3.1.0 (opens new window) - 2014-07-07

# Changed

  • 1.5x-2x speed boost.
  • Removed deprecated require('xxx.yml') support.
  • Significant code cleanup and refactoring.
  • Internal API changed. If you used custom types - see updated examples. Others are not affected.
  • Even if the input string has no trailing line break character, it will be parsed as if it has one.
  • Added benchmark scripts.
  • Moved bower files to /dist folder
  • Bugfixes.

# 3.0.2 (opens new window) - 2014-02-27

# Fixed

  • Fixed bug: "constructor" string parsed as null.

# 3.0.1 (opens new window) - 2013-12-22

# Fixed

  • Fixed parsing of literal scalars. (issue #108)
  • Prevented adding unnecessary spaces in object dumps. (issue #68)
  • Fixed dumping of objects with very long (> 1024 in length) keys.

# 3.0.0 (opens new window) - 2013-12-16

# Changed

  • Refactored code. Changed API for custom types.
  • Removed output colors in CLI, dump json by default.
  • Removed big dependencies from browser version (esprima, buffer). Load esprima manually, if !!js/function needed. !!bin now returns Array in browser
  • AMD support.
  • Don't quote dumped strings because of - & ? (if not first char).
  • Deprecated loading yaml files via require(), as not recommended behaviour for node.

# 2.1.3 (opens new window) - 2013-10-16

# Fixed

  • Fix wrong loading of empty block scalars.

# 2.1.2 (opens new window) - 2013-10-07

# Fixed

  • Fix unwanted line breaks in folded scalars.

# 2.1.1 (opens new window) - 2013-10-02

# Fixed

  • Dumper now respects deprecated booleans syntax from YAML 1.0/1.1
  • Fixed reader bug in JSON-like sequences/mappings.

# 2.1.0 (opens new window) - 2013-06-05

# Added

  • Add standard YAML schemas: Failsafe (FAILSAFE_SCHEMA), JSON (JSON_SCHEMA) and Core (CORE_SCHEMA).
  • Add skipInvalid dumper option.

# Changed

  • Rename DEFAULT_SCHEMA to DEFAULT_FULL_SCHEMA and SAFE_SCHEMA to DEFAULT_SAFE_SCHEMA.
  • Use safeLoad for require extension.

# Fixed

  • Bug fix: export NIL constant from the public interface.

# 2.0.5 (opens new window) - 2013-04-26

# Security

  • Close security issue in !!js/function constructor. Big thanks to @nealpoole for security audit.

# 2.0.4 (opens new window) - 2013-04-08

# Changed

  • Updated .npmignore to reduce package size

# 2.0.3 (opens new window) - 2013-02-26

# Fixed

  • Fixed dumping of empty arrays ans objects. ([] and {} instead of null)

# 2.0.2 (opens new window) - 2013-02-15

# Fixed

  • Fixed input validation: tabs are printable characters.

# 2.0.1 (opens new window) - 2013-02-09

# Fixed

  • Fixed error, when options not passed to function cass

# 2.0.0 (opens new window) - 2013-02-09

# Changed

  • Full rewrite. New architecture. Fast one-stage parsing.
  • Changed custom types API.
  • Added YAML dumper.

# 1.0.3 (opens new window) - 2012-11-05

# Fixed

  • Fixed utf-8 files loading.

# 1.0.2 (opens new window) - 2012-08-02

# Fixed

  • Pull out hand-written shims. Use ES5-Shims for old browsers support. See #44.
  • Fix timstamps incorectly parsed in local time when no time part specified.

# 1.0.1 (opens new window) - 2012-07-07

# Fixed

  • Fixes TypeError: 'undefined' is not an object under Safari. Thanks Phuong.
  • Fix timestamps incorrectly parsed in local time. Thanks @caolan. Closes #46.

# 1.0.0 (opens new window) - 2012-07-01

# Changed

  • y, yes, n, no, on, off are not converted to Booleans anymore. Fixes #42.
  • require(filename) now returns a single document and throws an Error if file contains more than one document.
  • CLI was merged back from js-yaml.bin

# 0.3.7 (opens new window) - 2012-02-28

# Fixed

  • Fix export of addConstructor(). Closes #39.

# 0.3.6 (opens new window) - 2012-02-22

# Changed

  • Removed AMD parts - too buggy to use. Need help to rewrite from scratch

# Fixed

  • Removed YUI compressor warning (renamed double variable). Closes #40.

# 0.3.5 (opens new window) - 2012-01-10

# Fixed

  • Workagound for .npmignore fuckup under windows. Thanks to airportyh.

# 0.3.4 (opens new window) - 2011-12-24

# Fixed

  • Fixes str[] for oldIEs support.
  • Adds better has change support for browserified demo.
  • improves compact output of Error. Closes #33.

# 0.3.3 (opens new window) - 2011-12-20

# Added

  • adds compact stringification of Errors.

# Changed

  • jsyaml executable moved to separate module.

# 0.3.2 (opens new window) - 2011-12-16

# Added

  • Added jsyaml executable.
  • Added !!js/function support. Closes #12.

# Fixed

  • Fixes ug with block style scalars. Closes #26.
  • All sources are passing JSLint now.
  • Fixes bug in Safari. Closes #28.
  • Fixes bug in Opers. Closes #29.
  • Improves browser support. Closes #20.

# 0.3.1 (opens new window) - 2011-11-18

# Added

  • Added AMD support for browserified version.
  • Added permalinks for online demo YAML snippets. Now we have YPaste service, lol.
  • Added !!js/regexp and !!js/undefined types. Partially solves #12.

# Changed

  • Wrapped browserified js-yaml into closure.

# Fixed

  • Fixed the resolvement of non-specific tags. Closes #17.
  • Fixed !!set mapping.
  • Fixed month parse in dates. Closes #19.

# 0.3.0 (opens new window) - 2011-11-09

# Added

  • Added browserified version. Closes #13.
  • Added live demo of browserified version.
  • Ported some of the PyYAML tests. See #14.

# Fixed

  • Removed JS.Class dependency. Closes #3.
  • Fixed timestamp bug when fraction was given.

# 0.2.2 (opens new window) - 2011-11-06

# Fixed

  • Fixed crash on docs without ---. Closes #8.
  • Fixed multiline string parse
  • Fixed tests/comments for using array as key

# 0.2.1 (opens new window) - 2011-11-02

# Fixed

  • Fixed short file read (<4k). Closes #9.

# 0.2.0 (opens new window) - 2011-11-02

# Changed

  • First public release
